scripts.build: npm --workspace @xapps/server-sdk run build && npm --workspace @xapps/widget-sdk run build && npm --workspace @xapps/signing-client run build && npm --workspace @xapps/openapi-import run build && npm --workspace xapps-embed-sdk run build && npm --workspace @xapps/browser-host run build && npm --workspace @xapps/backend-kit run build
scripts.smoke: npm --workspace @xapps/server-sdk run smoke && npm --workspace @xapps/widget-sdk run smoke && npm --workspace @xapps/signing-client run smoke && npm --workspace @xapps/openapi-import run smoke && npm --workspace xapps-embed-sdk run smoke && npm --workspace @xapps/browser-host run smoke && npm --workspace @xapps/backend-kit run smoke
scripts.pack:dry-run: npm pack --dry-run --workspace @xapps/server-sdk && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @xapps/widget-sdk && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @xapps/signing-client && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @xapps/openapi-import && npm pack --dry-run --workspace xapps-embed-sdk && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @xapps/browser-host && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @xapps/backend-kit
